scripts.watch-files: chokidar './**/*.{html,css,js}' --ignore '.history/**' --ignore 'assets/static/images/screenshots/**' -c "bash -c 'if [ -z "$SCREENSHOT_LOCK" ]; then SCREENSHOT_LOCK=1; node screenshot.js && xelatex -synctex=1 -interaction=nonstopmode -file-line-error -shell-escape main.tex; unset SCREENSHOT_LOCK; fi'"
